answers.answer: Gate big swings (spike → stop → my decision)
Lightweight internal harness (n>=8, our own scenarios)

Guided OAuth-subscription reuse (no new credentials)
Bundled free-tier API key (Gemini Flash / NVIDIA)
Stealth = headless/direct-CDP path only; extension is non-stealth
Selective per-site cookie import with explicit consent

Existing single-session sidepanel UX keeps working
Bridge CLI surface stays additive (no breaking changes)
Preserve AGPL + local-first IndexedDB storage
No 'undetectable' / bypass marketing claims
